name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Arlington, TX's US Cash Advance at 1603 W Park Row Dr provides fast payday and title loans with convenient extended hours.
description_long:
US Cash Advance's Arlington, TX location is situated at 1603 W Park Row Dr, Suite C, offering convenient access to fast cash loans for Arlington residents and visitors. The standalone storefront operates during extended hours, open Monday through Friday from 8AM to 9PM, and Saturday-Sunday from 10AM to 7PM, making it easy to visit even after traditional banking hours.

At this Arlington location, you can access payday loans, title loans, and other short-term lending services designed to address immediate cash needs. Call (682) 686-4790 to speak with loan specialists about your options, eligibility requirements, and application process.

If you're an Arlington resident facing unexpected expenses, US Cash Advance provides quick approval and funding. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a recent bank statement to speed up the application. Visit this convenient Park Row location for straightforward lending without the hassle of traditional bank approval.
address: 1603 W Park Row Dr suite c, Arlington, TX 76013

company_info.headquarters: 1603 W Park Row Dr suite c, Arlington, TX 76013

pros: Extended operating hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) for in-person consultations
Fast approval and funding process (customers report 45 minutes to 2 hours for in-person service)
Transparent fee and term communication, with customers specifically noting absence of hidden fees
Accepts all credit types, including customers with bad credit histories
Patient, informative staff per multiple customer reviews
cons: High-cost short-term debt product with APRs not disclosed on website, typical of payday loans
Physical waiting area described as cramped by at least one customer
Online pre-approval not available despite online application option
Advertises loans up to $50,000 for bad credit but most core products capped at $1,000
Third-party lender arrangement may complicate direct customer service resolution
best_for: Individuals needing emergency cash within hours for unexpected medical bills or urgent expenses
Borrowers with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional bank loans
Customers who prefer in-person service and verbal explanation of loan terms before commitment
People in Detroit area who value extended evening and weekend hours for loan processing
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area borrowers facing urgent financial emergencies who need cash within hours and have limited credit options, but require significant caution due to the high-cost nature of payday lending and undisclosed APR rates. Customers should understand that these loans are emergency stopgaps, not sustainable financial solutions, and that repayment terms likely involve substantial fees and interest costs typical of the payday loan industry.
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 1603 W Park Row Dr, Arlington, TX. Fast payday and title loans with extended hours.
